project.name: dmytroai-website
project.description: Style learning system for dmytroai.com — Dmytro's AI automation consulting website

styleGoal: Clear, direct, credible. Speaks to business owners. No fluff, no jargon.
hardRules: No corporate buzzwords (leverage, synergy, streamline, utilize)
No vague outcomes — always use specific numbers when available
No passive voice on value claims
Lead with the outcome, not the process
Address the reader as 'you', not 'businesses' or 'clients'
No AI tells: no 'delve', no 'it's worth noting', no 'in conclusion'
